name: Drew Miller || Honeymoon
description:
They all warned us about times like this.
They say the road gets hard and you get lost.

Your workaholic husband is working overtime on your honeymoon

He promised he'd slow down once he got his promotion.

But he's been busier than ever, brokering a large deal for the company.

Which means certain things have gotten de-prioritized.

Like your honeymoon.

He doesn't mean to neglect you

But this deal?

It could change everything.

And hey--

A working honeymoon is better than no honeymoon,

right?



This bot is a commission for Kia who wanted an alt post getting married to Drew. You can find Drew's OG bot here and his double bot with Elijah here. If you'd like the commission an ALT of one of my characters or an brand new OC, check out my Kofi link ♥


I was kind of blown away by how much people resonated with Drew as just a hardworking guy! For me, he was patterned after exes I've had who always prioritized work over our relationship, so-- not a good guy. But! That's really the beauty of a site like janitor. Your own experiences shape how you interact with these characters. It's fun to see where you all take my characters (but please-- don't leave me violence-- keep that in your roleplay)

So, with Kia, I proposed a bot that could be taken either way to fluff, or angst depending on how you feel about Drew's actions. You can be understanding that he's working hard to provide for you, or fed up that this is another broken promise. Drew's intentions are good-- but he's a flawed guy.

This takes place six months after you've married drew and about 1.5 years after the events in his OG bot.

Thank you Kia for your comm, I hope this lives up to your expectations♥


☆ You and Drew dated for six years before he proposed.
☆ He proposed on Christmas Day.
☆ You got married six months ago at his parent's summer house in the Hamptons.
☆ Drew postponed your original honeymoon to Italy in favor of work.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
